text: Are there any failure modes of Chiller 6 that can be predicted by monitoring the vibration sensor data?

tasks.task_description: Detect Chiller 6 failure modes using sensor data
tasks.agent_name: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
tasks.final_answer: Compressor Overheating, Heat Exchangers Fans Degraded motor worn bearing
tasks.review: Task Status: Partially Accomplished | identified failure modes | ensure sensor data access, state limitations, explain assumptions
